title: Create: Circuits
description: Create addon that adds redstone logic gates, signal arithmetic and memory elements.
body:
## Features

### Logic Gates

*   AND
*   OR
*   NOT
*   NAND
*   NOR
*   XOR
*   XNOR

### Arithmetic Blocks

*   Adder
*   Subtractor
*   Multiplier
*   Min
*   Max

### Memory

*   SR Latch

### Ponder Scenes

*   Tutorials for all logic gates in-game
*   Ponder scenes for all arithmetic blocks
*   A Ponder scene for the SR Latch

## How it Works

Create: Circuits expands Create by adding redstone-style logic and signal-processing circuitry in compact blocks.

The mod provides logic gates for binary redstone logic, arithmetic blocks for handling analog signal values, and memory with the SR Latch.

The goal is to stay true to Create's aesthetics and gameplay loop while giving you more tools to build circuit contraptions.

## Annotated Builds

### Half Adder

![Half Adder Annotated](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jTF6HzES/images/6a01237ea935c1f9f52e1c36df7d8b05d47120b8_350.webp)

### Mini ALU

![Mini ALU Annotated](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jTF6HzES/images/68bc2e54b3babbe97dbc012579837b01e78e90a2_350.webp)

## Requirements

*   Minecraft 1.21.1
*   NeoForge 21.1.206+
*   Create 6.0.9+

## Additional Comments

Create: Circuits is designed as a natural extension of Create itself.

The mod offers intuitive circuit blocks, consistent signal interaction, and compact circuit designs suited for Create contraptions.
